description: Layer-1 closed vocabulary of visual-edit codes for the image-similarity forensics pipeline. The MLLM may only emit codes from `codes[].code`. Two escape hatches (non_match, uncertain) are always permitted and must never be omitted in favor of a forced definite tag. Layer-2 DHF interpretive tags (relationship_type, intent_hypothesis) are NOT validated against this file.

codes.detect: Compare framing/boundaries; target omits regions present in source.
Geometric misalignment, edge artifacts.
Subject/text/gesture direction reversed.
Spatial relationships inverted.
Resampling artifacts, interpolation patterns.

codes.desc: Only part of one image overlaps the other (shared sub-region).
codes.detect: A subset of content matches; the rest diverges.

codes.desc: Region duplicated within the same image.
codes.detect: Repeated patterns / identical keypoints in non-adjacent regions.

codes.desc: Content combined from two or more images.
codes.detect: Seam artifacts, lighting/shadow mismatch, local compression inconsistency.
Unnaturally uniform texture where removal occurred.
Texture/lighting/shadow inconsistency vs surroundings.
Color histogram / white-balance shift in neutral areas.
Histogram shape, clipped highlights/shadows.
Luminance histogram shift, blown/crushed tones.
Posterization, histogram gaps, banding.
Unnatural tonal boundaries in specific regions.
Over-smoothed microstructure, missing grain.
Halos around edges, exaggerated high-frequency detail.
Over-smooth areas vs source noise pattern.
Inconsistent focus regions, unnatural blur boundaries.
Caption text differs between publication contexts; needs metadata.

codes.desc: Repositioned/regrouped in a different editorial layout.
codes.detect: Different surrounding text, article, or adjacent images.
Overlay elements not in source; rendering/compositing seams.
Date metadata/caption mismatch vs historical context.
Asymmetry, structural inconsistency, mismatched facial lighting.
GAN/diffusion artifacts, impossible physics, spectral inconsistency.
JPEG block misalignment, quantization artifacts.
Artifact-pattern / color-depth differences.

codes.desc: Loss from low-quality printing/scanning of historical media.
codes.detect: Halftone/screen patterns, ink bleed, paper texture; not a deliberate edit.

codes.desc: Detail lost in print such that fine forensic cues are unrecoverable.
codes.detect: Flat, low-frequency regions where source had detail; gates confidence rather than asserting an edit.

codes.desc: The two images are NOT the same base photograph.
codes.detect: Different scene/subject despite CV similarity; always allowed.
Use whenever print degradation, missing metadata, or ambiguity prevents a confident call.
